desc: In src/graph.js, the DFS `visit` function used by the topological sort pushes each node into the result array as soon as it's marked visited (pre-order), instead of after recursing into its dependencies (post-order). This means a node can appear before its own prerequisites in the output. Fix `visit` in src/graph.js so that a node is only appended to `result` after all of its dependency children have been visited, so that tests/toposort.test.ts passes.
